---
title: "Publications"
format: html
---

<div id="pub-list">Downloading...</div>

<script>
async function loadPublications() {
  const container = document.getElementById("pub-list");

  try {
    const response = await fetch("publications.json");
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error("publications.json yüklenemedi.");
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    const groups = data.group || data["activities-summary"]?.works?.group || [];

    if (groups.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = "<p>Henüz yayın bulunamadı.</p>";
      return;
    }

    let html = '<div class="pub-wrapper">';

    groups.forEach(group => {
      const work = group["work-summary"]?.[0];
      if (!work) return;

      const title = work.title?.title?.value || "Başlıksız kayıt";
      const journal = work["journal-title"]?.value || "";
      const year = work["publication-date"]?.year?.value || "";
      const type = (work.type || "").replaceAll("-", " ");
      const extIds = work["external-ids"]?.["external-id"] || [];

let doiUrl = "";
let recordUrl = "";

extIds.forEach(id => {
  const idType = (id["external-id-type"] || "").toLowerCase();
  const idValue = id["external-id-value"] || "";
  const idUrl = id["external-id-url"]?.value || "";

  if (idType === "doi" && idValue) {
    doiUrl = `https://doi.org/${idValue}`;
  }

  if (idUrl) {
    recordUrl = idUrl;
  }
});

// OA kontrolü (basit heuristic)
const isOpenAccess =
  recordUrl.includes("open") ||
  recordUrl.includes("pdf") ||
  recordUrl.includes("handle") ||
  recordUrl.includes("researchgate");

// link oluşturma
let linksHtml = "";

// DOI varsa (ve aynı değilse)
if (doiUrl && doiUrl !== recordUrl) {
  linksHtml += `<a class="pub-btn" href="${doiUrl}" target="_blank">DOI</a>`;
}

// record link varsa
if (recordUrl) {
  const label = isOpenAccess ? "Open Access" : "View Article";
  linksHtml += `<a class="pub-btn pub-btn-secondary" href="${recordUrl}" target="_blank">${label}</a>`;
}

      extIds.forEach(id => {
        const idType = (id["external-id-type"] || "").toLowerCase();
        const idValue = id["external-id-value"] || "";
        const idUrl = id["external-id-url"]?.value || "";

        if (idType === "doi" && idValue) {
          doiLink = `<a class="pub-btn" href="https://doi.org/${idValue}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>`;
        }

        if (idUrl) {
          recordLink = `<a class="pub-btn pub-btn-secondary" href="${idUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Kayıt</a>`;
        }
      });

      html += `
        <div class="pub-item">
          <div class="pub-title">${title}</div>
          ${journal ? `<div class="pub-journal">${journal}</div>` : ""}
          <div class="pub-meta">
            ${year ? `<span class="pub-badge">${year}</span>` : ""}
            ${type ? `<span class="pub-badge pub-badge-light">${type}</span>` : ""}
          </div>
        <div class="pub-links">
          ${linksHtml}
        </div>
        </div>
      `;
    });

    html += "</div>";
    container.innerHTML = html;

  } catch (error) {
    container.innerHTML = `<p>Yayınlar yüklenirken hata oluştu: ${error.message}</p>`;
  }
}

loadPublications();
</script>
